Interface ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener

Enclosing class:
ExploreEventAdapter
public static interface ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener
Callback interface for delivering invitation interaction events to the hosting
invalid reference 
android.app.Activity
or Fragment.

Implement this interface to respond to user actions on invitation rows without coupling the adapter to any specific business logic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onAcceptClick(Event event)
    Called when the user taps the Accept button on an invitation row.
    void
    onCardClick(Event event)
    Called when the user taps anywhere on an invitation row outside the Accept and Decline buttons, typically to view event details.
    void
    onDeclineClick(Event event)
    Called when the user taps the Decline button on an invitation row.

  • Method Details

    • onAcceptClick

      void onAcceptClick(Event event)
      Called when the user taps the Accept button on an invitation row.
      Parameters:
      event - the Event whose invitation was accepted; never null

    • onDeclineClick

      void onDeclineClick(Event event)
      Called when the user taps the Decline button on an invitation row.
      Parameters:
      event - the Event whose invitation was declined; never null

    • onCardClick

      void onCardClick(Event event)
      Called when the user taps anywhere on an invitation row outside the Accept and Decline buttons, typically to view event details.
      Parameters:
      event - the Event whose row was tapped; never null
